title: senecio abruptus
intro: Senecio abruptus, also known as Woolly Groundsel, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family. It is used in herbal medicine for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing antioxidant properties, making it a popular choice for natural remedies. Senecio abruptus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for a variety of herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
